component.name: JPKI Local Signer
component.description: On-device PDF signing and verification with Japan's My Number Card (iOS + macOS).

properties.name: note
properties.value: Generated by hand from Package.resolved (version 3). Update alongside dependency changes.

properties.name: usage
properties.value: SHA-256/384/512; RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 signature verification (_CryptoExtras).

properties.name: usage
properties.value: X.509 parsing: subject/issuer, subjectAltName (JPKI holder name/address), chain signature verification for trust classification.

components.name: JPKI signing CA root certificates
components.description: J-LIS-published 公的個人認証サービス 署名用CA root certificates bundled for offline JPKI trust classification. Not code; fingerprints verified against J-LIS published values.

properties.name: network-dependencies
properties.value: none — the product links no networking API; verified by scripts/check-no-network.sh in CI.

properties.name: closed-source-dependencies
properties.value: none — all dependencies are Apple open-source (Apache-2.0).
